message:
fix(semaphore): wake next waiter after front acquires if permits remain (bd-2o59)

When add_permits(N) was called with N satisfying multiple waiters,
only the first waiter was woken. After it acquired, remaining permits
sat unclaimed because no one woke subsequent waiters. Now the poll
logic wakes the next front waiter if permits remain after acquisition.

Also cfg-gate e2e_database_migration.rs behind feature = "sqlite"
and apply fmt fixes to test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
